ns0:entry.ns0:title: 648540858/wvp-GB28181-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/648540858/wvp-GB28181-pro
Language: java
基于GB28181-2016、部标808、部标1078标准实现的开箱即用的网络视频平台。自带管理页面，支持NAT穿透，支持海康、大华、宇视等品牌的IPC、NVR接入。支持国标级联，支持将普通摄像机/直播流/直播推流转国标共享到国标平台。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-java
Language: java
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for Java. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://docs.microsoft.com/java/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-java.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DependencyTrack/dependency-track

URL: https://github.com/DependencyTrack/dependency-track
Language: java
Dependency-Track is an intelligent Component Analysis platform that allows organizations to identify and reduce risk in the software supply chain.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
Language: java
𝑫𝒆𝒗𝑶𝒑𝒔 𝑹𝒆𝒂𝒍 𝑾𝒐𝒓𝒍𝒅 𝑷𝒓𝒐𝒋𝒆𝒄𝒕𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝑨𝒔𝒑𝒊𝒓𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝑫𝒆𝒗𝑶𝒑𝒔 𝑬𝒏𝒈𝒊𝒏𝒆𝒆𝒓𝒔 [𝑩𝒆𝒈𝒊𝒏𝒏𝒆𝒓 𝒕𝒐 𝑨𝒅𝒗𝒂𝒏𝒄𝒆𝒅]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro
Language: java
🔥 官方推荐 🔥 RuoYi-Vue 全新 Pro 版本，优化重构所有功能。基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis Plus + Vue & Element 实现的后台管理系统 + 微信小程序，支持 RBAC 动态权限、数据权限、SaaS 多租户、Flowable 工作流、三方登录、支付、短信、商城、CRM、ERP、AI 大模型、IoT 物联网等功能。你的 ⭐️ Star ⭐️，是作者生发的动力！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: testcontainers/testcontainers-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/testcontainers/testcontainers-java
Language: java
Testcontainers is a Java library that supports JUnit tests, providing lightweight, throwaway instances of common databases, Selenium web browsers, or anything else that can run in a Docker container.

Language: java
Official repository of Trino, the distributed SQL query engine for big data, formerly known as PrestoSQL (https://trino.io)
